headline: AbbVie Presents New Data at EHA 2026 Congress for VENCLEXTA®/VENCLYXTO® (venetoclax) in First-Line Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia Highlighting Long-Term Treatment Outcomes for Patients: Nine-Year Results
summary: AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) today announced new Phase 3 data on a fixed-duration venetoclax-based combination at the European Hematology Association (EHA) 2026 Congress taking place June 11-14 in Stockholm, Sweden. Final results from the Phase 3 CLL14 trial in previously untreated chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL), which was conducted in collaboration with the German CLL Study Group, will be featured in an oral presentation.
